species: Hsp90 is at the hub of proteostasis and cellular signaling networks in cancer and is, therefore, an attractive therapeutic target in cancer.
disease_state: HAP1 cells are a haploid human cell line derived from the KBM-7 chronic myelogenous leukemia (CML) cell line.
